metadata.issued_by: National Cyber Forensics Unit, New Delhi

content: Examination of the Kharagpur Tehsil Digital Land Record (2016 Entry): 1. Metadata of the digital file shows the last edit occurred on 04/04/2019 at 14:23 IST. 2. IP address traced to a terminal in the Tehsil Office, logged in with Debashish Mukherjee’s credentials. 3. The original paper copy was reported destroyed in a 2019 fire — but the digital file was not backed up until after the fire, indicating premeditated deletion. 4. No authorized access log exists for the date of alteration. Conclusion: The 2016 land revenue record was digitally altered posthumously by Debashish Mukherjee to support Priya Chatterjee’s mutation claim.
